summary: Guard authHeader's read-and-maybe-refresh sequence with a Client-level sync.Mutex so concurrent fan-out workers can't double-refresh.
reason: cliutil.FanoutRun runs worker goroutines that share one *client.Client. When the access token is expired at fan-out start, multiple goroutines would simultaneously enter refreshAccessToken and race on cfg.AccessToken / cfg.RefreshToken writes (a Go data race). Worse, most OAuth servers issue single-use refresh tokens: the second concurrent call arrives after rotation and returns 400 invalid_grant, failing every subsequent worker until the user re-runs `auth login`.
